div.head: The Ambassador in Peru (Norweb) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 668. For the Under Secretary. Department’s telegram no. 331, September 12, 11 p.m.Not printed. The war between the United States and Japan will result in difficult economic and trade problems for Peru. Some comment is starting regarding markets for Peruvian cotton. No mention has been made so far of the possibility of a trade agreement between the United States and Peru but I would appreciate your views as to whether or not it might be good policy for us to reopen this question.

Peruvian action with respect to the attack of Japan against the United States has been favorable. … An initiative from us in the matter of the trade agreement might consolidate our improved position in Peru.
